leader.name: Donald Trump
leader.title: 대통령
leader.original_text: President Trump has imposed International Emergency Economic Powers Act (IEEPA) tariffs on US trading partners, including China, Canada, Mexico, and the EU.

economic_team.name: Scott Bessent
economic_team.title: 재무장관
economic_team.original_text: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent's policy approach focused on tariffs and fiscal discipline

policy_orientation.original_text: The Trump tariffs amount to an average tax increase per US household of $1,000 in 2025 and $1,300 in 2026. President Trump has expanded tariffs on a wide range of countries and goods.

central_bank.name: Fed
central_bank.original_text: The Fed's New Policymakers for 2026: Three Hawks and a Dove. Four voting members of the Fed's policy committee changed this month, with three of the incomers making hawkish comments recently. Kevin Warsh set to be named new Fed chair. The battle between the President and Fed Chair has been a gripping one.

stability.stability_rationale: 공화당 상하원 장악으로 정책 추진 가능하나 관세정책 불확실성 및 Fed와의 갈등 잠재
stability.original_text: The US Supreme Court is considering the legality of some of the tariffs. Interest rate decisions, the national debt, tariffs, worries about a stock market bubble and the low-hire, low-fire labor market are among the big economic issues that will take center stage in 2026.

leader.name: Xi Jinping (시진핑)
leader.title: 국가주석/당총서기
leader.original_text: China's top leaders made strengthening domestic demand their top economic priority for 2026, while hinting at a measured approach to stimulus. The Communist Party's decision-making Politburo led by President Xi Jinping pledged during its December huddle.

economic_team.name: He Lifeng (허리펑)
economic_team.title: 부총리 (경제 담당)
economic_team.original_text: China's leadership signals domestic demand priority for 2026

policy_orientation.original_text: China signaled it will maintain economic support but refrain from ramping up stimulus next year. The leadership will 'flexibly and efficiently' use interest rate and reserve requirement cuts to ensure sufficient liquidity. China's central bank on Tuesday said that it will continue to implement a moderately loose monetary policy in 2026, using tools such as reserve requirement ratio and interest rate cuts to maintain ample liquidity.

central_bank.name: PBOC (중국인민은행)
central_bank.original_text: China's PBOC adopts a 'strategic pause' in 2025-2026, balancing growth stabilization with debt/asset bubble risks amid a fragile economy. Targeted 25-basis-point rate cuts and expanded lending quotas aim to support agriculture, tech, and private sectors without broad stimulus.

stability.stability_rationale: 일당 체제로 정치적 안정성 높으나, 부동산 위기와 지방정부 부채 리스크 상존
stability.original_text: Persistent deflationary pressures, $18.9T local debt, and a 27-month housing inventory crisis highlight structural risks. IMF warns China's growth depends on structural reforms.

leader.name: 이재명
leader.title: 대통령
leader.original_text: 이재명 대통령이 2일 재정경제부 2차관에 허장 한국수출입은행 ESG 위원회 위원장을 임명했다. 이재명 대통령은 오늘 재정경제부 2차관, 우주항공청장, 국가물관리 위원회 위원장을 임명했다.

economic_team.name: 재정경제부 장관 (확인 필요)
economic_team.title: 재정경제부 장관
economic_team.original_text: 허장 차관은 재정경제부 출신의 정통 경제 관료로서 국제통화기금 IMF의 상임이사와 기획재정부 국제경제관리관 등을 거친 국제 금융 및 대외경제 정책 전문가입니다.

policy_orientation.original_text: 정부가 제시한 '2026년 경제성장전략'에는 전략수출금융기금 신설, 20조 원 규모 한국형 국부펀드 조성, 국민참여형 국민성장펀드 도입, 생산적 금융 ISA 확대, 원화 국제화 추진, 노동권 보호와 안전한 일터 조성, 지역 균형 발전을 위한 재정·세제 지원 등이 포함됐습니다. 재정과 감세 정책을 총동원해 1%대 후반으로 떨어진 잠재성장률을 3% 가까이 끌어올리겠다는 것이다.

central_bank.name: 한국은행
central_bank.original_text: 한국은행, 기준금리 2.50%로 동결, 기준금리 인하 사이클 종료 시사. 통화정책방향문서에서 '금리 인하 가능성을 열어둔다'는 문구와, '금리 인하 가능성을 열어두되, 기준금리의 추가 인하 여부 및 시기를 결정해 나갈 것'이라는 문구를 삭제하였다. 금통위원 6인 중 5인이 3개월 내 기준금리 동결이 바람직하다고 밝혔다.

stability.stability_rationale: 여대야소 상황으로 정책 추진력 확보, 그러나 부동산/환율 리스크 관리 필요
stability.original_text: 이창용 총재는 '금리는 K자형 회복 문제를 해결하는 데 적절한 수단이 아니라고 생각한다'고 밝혔다. 환율 상승이 물가에 상방 압력을 가할 시 금리 인상을 고려할 필요가 있다고 발언.

legislature.original_text: 이재명 대통령 (더불어민주당), 국회 과반 더불어민주당 보유

leader.name: Shigeru Ishiba (이시바 시게루)
leader.title: 총리
leader.original_text: Prime Minister Shigeru Ishiba said Japan is not in an environment for an additional rate increase. Ishiba under pressure to step down after the LDP's defeat in July's upper house election.

economic_team.name: Katsunobu Kato (카토 가쓰노부)
economic_team.title: 재무상
economic_team.original_text: Economy minister urges BOJ to be cautious of raising rates

policy_orientation.original_text: Bank of Japan raises economic growth forecast as it holds rates at 0.75%. The BOJ also raised its GDP growth forecast for FY2025/26 to 7.3% (note: this appears to reference India's RBI, Japan's BOJ held rates). Political dynamics may delay BOJ rate hikes, analysts say.

central_bank.name: BOJ (일본은행)
central_bank.original_text: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda said there was no change to the BoJ's readiness to keep raising interest rates if the economy and prices move as projected. Ueda highlights BOJ's intention to keep raising rate to bankers. The central bank ended its decade-long stimulus last year and lifted short-term rates to 0.5% in January, convinced Japan was nearing its 2% inflation goal.

stability.stability_rationale: LDP 상원 선거 패배 후 이시바 총리 사퇴 압박, 정치적 불확실성 높음
stability.original_text: However, political uncertainty may complicate the outlook, with Ishiba under pressure to step down after the LDP's defeat in July's upper house election. The party is expected to decide next week whether to hold a leadership race.

leader.name: Narendra Modi (나렌드라 모디)
leader.title: 총리
leader.original_text: The Union Budget 2026-27, under the visionary leadership of Prime Minister Narendra Modi. Since we assumed office 12 years ago, India's economic trajectory has been marked by stability, fiscal discipline, sustained growth and moderate inflation.

economic_team.name: Nirmala Sitharaman (니르말라 시타라만)
economic_team.title: 재무장관
economic_team.original_text: BUDGET 2026-2027 SPEECH OF NIRMALA SITHARAMAN MINISTER OF FINANCE February 1, 2026

policy_orientation.original_text: The major change in this Budget is that after trying to boost consumption over the past three Budgets, the government is back to focusing on the supply side. RBI could deliver a 50 bps rate cut in 2026 to boost growth momentum. The US is one of India's largest export markets and it has put a 50% tariff on all imports from India.

central_bank.name: RBI (인도준비은행)
central_bank.original_text: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) lowered its key repo rate by 25 bps to 5.25% during its December 2025 meeting. The RBI has now cut rates by a total of 125 bps since the beginning of the year, bringing the repo rate to its lowest level since July 2022. RBI raised its GDP growth forecast for FY2025/26 to 7.3%, up from its earlier estimate of 6.8%. Meanwhile, headline inflation was revised down to 2.0% from 2.6%.

stability.stability_rationale: BJP 연속 3선, 안정적 다수당 정부 운영
stability.original_text: It has benefited from a slice of luck, a commitment to economic reform and a shove from geopolitics. The ascent of India's economy.

leader.name: To Lam (또 럼)
leader.title: 공산당 총서기
leader.original_text: Vietnam's Communist Party General Secretary To Lam speaks during the 14th National Party Congress in Hanoi on Jan.20. Vietnam's Communist Party has renewed its leadership and endorsed an ambitious reform program. To Lam has been re-appointed Vietnam's top leader.

economic_team.name: Pham Minh Chinh (팜 민 찐)
economic_team.title: 총리
economic_team.original_text: Prime Minister Pham Minh Chinh on January 24 signed an urgent dispatch outlining key tasks and solutions to drive economic growth in 2026.

policy_orientation.original_text: Vietnam targets GDP growth of at least 10% in 2026-2030, To Lam says. Communist Party chief touts achievements of 'Doi Moi' reforms 40 years on. The National Assembly targeting 10% GDP growth for 2026. Vietnam's GDP grew by 8% in 2025 and the VN-Index surged 37% (in USD terms). Vietnam's Doi Moi 2.0 structural reforms are promoting the private sector and should ultimately add 2%pts to the country's GDP growth.

central_bank.name: SBV (베트남국가은행)
central_bank.original_text: The State Bank of Vietnam (SBV) plans to steer credit growth across the banking system to around 15% in 2026, with room for adjustment in line with macroeconomic conditions, inflationary pressures and banking system safety. Vietnam's central bank has set a credit growth target of 15 per cent for 2026, down from last year's target of 16 per cent.

stability.stability_rationale: 공산당 일당 체제, 또 럼 총서기 재신임으로 정책 연속성 확보
stability.original_text: Vietnam's ruling Communist Party has renewed its leadership and endorsed an ambitious reform program aimed at transforming the economy by 2030.

leader.name: Prabowo Subianto (프라보워 수비안토)
leader.title: 대통령
leader.original_text: Indonesia's 2026 state budget is the first that is truly President Prabowo Subianto's, in the sense that his administration drafted and defended it. Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto on Friday proposed a $234 billion budget for 2026, forecasting a deficit of 2.48% of GDP, while pledging to eliminate the shortfall and achieve a balanced budget within three years.

economic_team.name: Sadewa
economic_team.title: 재무장관
economic_team.original_text: In the latest revised budget 2026 under the new leadership of Finance Minister Sadewa, the Indonesian government targets 5.4% GDP growth in 2026.

policy_orientation.original_text: The 2026 budget, which targets annual GDP growth of 5.4%, seeks to ensure Southeast Asia's largest economy is 'strong, independent and prosperous'. GDP growth targeted at 5.4% in 2026. Deficit forecast at 2.48% of GDP. Spending proposal is 7% higher than 2025. Revenues expected to rise almost 10%. Budget for free meals, defence jump.

central_bank.name: BI (인도네시아은행)
central_bank.original_text: Bank Indonesia (BI) forecasts that the national economy will grow by 5.33% in 2026. 'If fiscal spending can be accelerated, economic growth could reach 5.4%,' Perry said. BI also projects core inflation in 2026 at 2.62%, while the rupiah exchange rate is expected to be around IDR16,500 per USD.

stability.stability_rationale: 프라보워 신정부 정책 불확실성, 루피아 약세 및 재정 리스크 우려
stability.original_text: Market volatility, investor unease and fiscal strain are exposing deeper risks in Indonesia's economy – where policy ambition is running ahead of institutional readiness. Economist Warns of Potential Fiscal Time Bomb in 2026 Draft State Budget. The credibility of policymaking in Indonesia has been dealt a fresh blow at the start of 2026.

regional.rationale: 관세 불확실성 있으나 기업 실적 견조, Fed 정책 전환 기대
내수 부양 정책에도 불구 구조적 성장 둔화, 미중 갈등 리스크
여대야소 정책 추진력, 코스피 6,000 목표, K-반도체/AI 성장
정치 불안정성 있으나 엔화 강세 기대, BOJ 정상화 진행
7%+ 성장 지속, 친기업 정책, 미중 공급망 재편 수혜
10% 성장 목표, Doi Moi 2.0 개혁, 제조업 허브 부상
재정 리스크 있으나 5%+ 성장, 인구 보너스 활용

sector.policy_factor: 미국 반도체 보호 정책 + 한국 K-반도체 육성 + 중국 자립화
한국 방산 4대 강국 정책 + 각국 국방비 증액
금리 인하 사이클 종료, NIM 안정화 기대
인도 내수 확대 + 베트남 소비 회복 + 한국 민생안정 정책
한국 탄소중립 정책 + 인도 에너지 전환
한국 주택공급 가속화 vs 금리 동결

scenarios.name: 미국 관세 전쟁 심화 시나리오
scenarios.market_impact: 글로벌 무역량 감소, 공급망 재편 가속화
scenarios.portfolio_response: 미국 비중 축소, 인도/베트남 비중 확대, 방어주 선호
scenarios.original_text: President Trump has imposed IEEPA tariffs on US trading partners. The Trump tariffs amount to an average tax increase per US household of $1,300 in 2026.

scenarios.name: Fed 금리 인하 재개 시나리오
scenarios.trigger: 미국 경기 둔화 신호 + 워시 의장의 비둘기파 전환
scenarios.market_impact: 달러 약세, 신흥국 자금 유입, 위험자산 선호
scenarios.portfolio_response: 신흥국 비중 확대, 성장주 비중 확대
scenarios.original_text: Kevin Warsh set to be named new Fed chair, but will Powell stay on? The battle between a president who wants lower rates and a Fed Chair who remains focused on inflation.

scenarios.name: 한국 정책 모멘텀 시나리오
scenarios.trigger: 이재명 정부 경제정책 성공적 추진, 기업실적 호조
scenarios.original_text: 2026년을 '한국경제 대도약 원년(잠재성장률 반등+양극화 극복)'으로 만들기 위한 관계부처 합동 2026년 경제성장전략 마련.

scenarios.name: 중국 경기 반등 시나리오
scenarios.trigger: 내수 부양책 효과 + 부동산 시장 안정화
scenarios.market_impact: 중국 증시 반등, 원자재 수요 증가
scenarios.portfolio_response: 중국 비중 12%로 확대, 원자재 관련주 관심
scenarios.original_text: China's top leaders made strengthening domestic demand their top economic priority for 2026. 'We must adhere to domestic demand as the main driver and build a strong domestic market.'

ranking.rationale: 7%+ 성장률, 인구 보너스, 친기업 정책, 공급망 다변화 수혜
10% 성장 목표, Doi Moi 2.0 개혁, 제조업 허브
기술 선도, K-반도체/AI, 안정적 정치 환경
기술 혁신 선도, but 관세 불확실성 및 재정적자
기업 지배구조 개혁, but 정치 불안정 및 저성장
인구 보너스, 내수 성장, but 정책 불확실성
기술력 있으나 구조적 둔화, 미중 갈등

long_term_growth_potential.31_year_perspective: 31년 장기투자 관점에서 인도와 베트남이 가장 높은 성장 잠재력을 보유. 인구 구조, 개혁 의지, 글로벌 공급망 재편 수혜 측면에서 유리. 한국은 기술 경쟁력으로 선진국 수준의 안정적 성장 기대.
